title: Privacy Policy
description-1: This Privacy Policy describes how the Devs Tocantins Community ("we", "our", or "legado.dev") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our service.
description-2: By using legado.dev, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. We are compliant with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD).
definitions_description: For the purposes of this policy:
account_description: A unique account created for you to access our Service.
personal_data_definition: Any information related to an identified or identifiable natural person.
usage_data_description: Information collected automatically (such as IP and browser type) for security and stability.
personal_data_description: When registering, we collect your first name, last name, and email address. If you use social login, we collect your unique identifier and profile picture provided by the provider (Google or GitHub).
usage_data_auto_collected: We store your progress, XP, badges, and contribution history to maintain the community ranking.
security_paragraph: We use trusted partners to operate the system. Your data is processed by:
contact_us_paragraph: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. Upon account deletion, your personal data will be permanently anonymized and your XP will be reset, preserving only the database integrity in a non-identifiable way.
contact_us_by_email: For questions, contact us via email:
